name: @andrewconnell/senja-mcp
description: MCP server for the Senja testimonial API

scripts.inspect:mcpinspector: SENJA_API_KEY=op://Private/Senja/api-key op run -- npx @modelcontextprotocol/inspector node lib/index.js -e SENJA_API_KEY=$SENJA_API_KEY
scripts.inspect:latest: SENJA_API_KEY=op://Private/Senja/api-key op run -- npx @modelcontextprotocol/inspector npx @andrewconnell/senja-mcp@latest -e SENJA_API_KEY=$SENJA_API_KEY
scripts.inspect:next: SENJA_API_KEY=op://Private/Senja/api-key op run -- npx @modelcontextprotocol/inspector npx @andrewconnell/senja-mcp@next -e SENJA_API_KEY=$SENJA_API_KEY
